title: How to Cut Your ACoS from 90% to 18%
description: The exact 5-step audit framework we use to diagnose bleeding campaigns and rebuild keyword structure from scratch. Includes real account screenshots.

title: Amazon Listing Optimization Checklist
description: The 47-point checklist our team runs on every new client account — from title structure and bullet points to A+ content and backend keywords.

title: The India Seller's Guide to TaCoS
description: Why TaCoS (Total Advertising Cost of Sale) is the only metric that matters for scaling on Amazon India — and how to track it properly.

title: Meta Ads for Amazon Sellers: External Traffic That Converts
description: How to build a Facebook/Instagram funnel that drives warm traffic to your Amazon listings without burning budget on cold audiences.

title: Flipkart vs Amazon India: Where to Focus Your Budget
description: A data-driven breakdown of ROAS, competition levels, and category performance across both platforms — so you know where each rupee works hardest.

title: Amazon UK Launch Blueprint for Indian Sellers
description: The complete playbook for Indian brands expanding to Amazon UK — GST registration, listing localisation, PPC structure, and winning the Buy Box.

title: Search Term Analysis
description: Upload your Amazon Search Term Report CSV, set your target ACoS, and get a full visual dashboard — scale opportunities, negate candidates, n-gram patterns, and match-type breakdown. All in your browser, no sign-up.

title: Listing Quality Scorecard
description: Score your Amazon listing across title, bullets, A+ content, images, price, reviews, and keywords. Get a prioritised fix list with an overall readiness score out of 100.

title: Review Rating Calculator
description: Enter your current review count and star rating, set your target — get a full scenario breakdown showing how many 5★, 4★ or 3★ reviews you need to get there. Includes a what-if simulator.

title: ACoS Break-even Calculator
description: Enter your selling price, COGS, and Amazon fees to instantly see your break-even ACoS and target ACoS. Know if your campaigns are profitable before spending another rupee. Includes scenario table and visual gauge.

title: Amazon Profit & Margin Calculator
description: Calculate your true net profit after COGS, referral fees, FBA fees, PPC spend and other costs. See margin %, ROI, break-even units, and a monthly scale scenario table — all in one free tool.
